nasb.text: “But if you turn away and forsake My statutes and My commandments which I have set before you, and go and serve other gods and worship them,

esv.text: “But if you turn aside and forsake my statutes and my commandments that I have set before you, and go and serve other gods and worship them,

cnv.text: “可是，如果你們轉離我，丟棄我在你們面前頒布的律例和誡命，去事奉和敬拜別的神，

ccb.text: “然而，如果你们背弃我指示你们的律例和诫命，去供奉、祭拜别的神明，
